units.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings
Heretic Astartes Daemon Prince with wings

Chaos Land Raider.rule: This model has a transport capacity of 14 Emperor's Children Infantry models. Each Terminator and Flawless Blade model takes up the space of 2 models.

Chaos Rhino.rule: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Emperor's Children Infantrymodels (excluding Terminator and Flawless Blade models).

competitive: Prioriza movilidad, redundancia anti-tank y unidades que puntuen sin exponerse.
casual: Evita skew extremo y mezcla piezas iconicas con herramientas claras de mision.
narrative: Incluye un lider tematico y una unidad centerpiece aunque no sea la opcion mas eficiente.
